CREATE TABLE employee (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), department_id INT);
CREATE TABLE department (id INT PRIMARY KEY, department_name VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO employee (id, name, department_id) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 1);
INSERT INTO employee (id, name, department_id) VALUES (2, 'Bob', 1);
SELECT * FROM employee WHERE department_id = (SELECT id FROM department WHERE department_name = 'HR');

INSERT INTO employee (id, name, department_id) VALUES (4, 'David', 2);
INSERT INTO employee (id, name, department_id) VALUES (5, 'Eva', 3);
INSERT INTO employee (id, name, department_id) VALUES (6, 'Frank', 4);
SELECT name FROM employee WHERE id = 6;
